name: github_api
description: Performs GitHub operations via the gh CLI, supporting PRs, issues, repos, workflows, and raw API calls. Returns structured JSON responses.

primary.note: Official GitHub CLI with structured JSON output support.

fallback.note: HTTP client. Reduced fidelity — manual URL construction and authentication required.

args: {% if action == 'pr_create' %}pr create{% elif action == 'pr_list' %}pr list --json number,title,author,state,createdAt,updatedAt,url{% elif action == 'issue_create' %}issue create{% elif action == 'issue_list' %}issue list --json number,title,author,state,createdAt,updatedAt,url{% elif action == 'repo_clone' %}repo clone{% elif action == 'repo_view' %}repo view --json name,owner,description,url,defaultBranch{% elif action == 'workflow_run' %}run list --json databaseId,status,conclusion,event,headBranch,createdAt{% elif action == 'api' %}api{% endif %}
{% if action in ['pr_create','issue_create'] and args.title %}--title "{{ args.title }}"{% endif %}
{% if action in ['pr_create','issue_create'] and args.body %}--body "{{ args.body }}"{% endif %}
{% if action == 'pr_create' and args.base %}--base {{ args.base }}{% endif %}
{% if action in ['pr_list','issue_list'] and args.state %}--state {{ args.state }}{% endif %}
{% if action == 'repo_clone' and args.repo %}"{{ args.repo }}"{% endif %}
{% if action == 'repo_clone' and args.directory %}"{{ args.directory }}"{% endif %}
{% if action == 'repo_view' and args.repo %}{{ args.repo }}{% endif %}
{% if action == 'workflow_run' and args.repo %}--repo {{ args.repo }}{% endif %}
{% if action == 'api' and args.endpoint %}{{ args.endpoint }}{% endif %}
{% if action == 'api' and args.method %}--method {{ args.method }}{% endif %}

pipeline.description: Parse gh JSON output into structured response.
Build GitHub API envelope with action-specific fields.

args: {% if args.method == 'POST' or args.method == 'PUT' or args.method == 'PATCH' %}-X {{ args.method }}{% endif %}
output_gaps: authentication must be provided manually via headers
action-specific output shaping unavailable; raw API response returned

compatible_downstream.description: Pipe GitHub API responses into jq for extraction.
